content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-solana Daily Update (Apr 1, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity on April 1, 2026, focused on ecosystem expansion and integration proposals. The community is actively discussing new plugins for AI-to-AI marketplaces and trust-verification layers, with a new proposal submitted for the MAXIA marketplace integration.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Marketplace Integration**
    *   A proposal was introduced to integrate the MAXIA AI-to-AI marketplace, enabling agents to perform token swaps, GPU rentals, and service procurement across multiple chains, including Solana. [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-solana/issues/6700)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   **AI Marketplace Integration**
    *   Proposed the addition of `plugin-maxia` to facilitate native access to the MAXIA marketplace for ElizaOS agents. [#6700](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-solana/issues/6700)

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#6688](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-solana/issues/6688) Plugin Proposal: AgentID — Cryptographic Identity & Trust Layer**
    *   Discussion continues regarding the implementation of behavioral fingerprinting. Contributors are debating the merits of static trust tiers (L0-L4) versus dynamic, continuous scoring metrics like CSML (Composite Safety-Model Latency). Participants are exploring ways to align evidence schemas to ensure interoperability between different trust-layer implementations.
*   **[#6501](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-solana/issues/6501) Integration Proposal: MoltBridge Trust & Discovery Layer**
    *   The proposer confirmed that MoltBridge remains active and has achieved further ecosystem milestones, including registration in the A2A registry. The discussion highlights the potential for ElizaOS agents to utilize MoltBridge for trust-verified discovery and reputation building through attestations.
